meta.description:
TEI Publisher extension that adds rendering support for MENOTA-encoded manuscripts (me:facs, me:dipl, me:norm, me:pal). Built for the Antidote project (https://antidote.hi.is) so scholars working with MENOTA-encoded sources can publish them through TEI Publisher.
This is an independent library. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or maintained by the MENOTA project (https://menota.org).
meta.author: Martin Roček
